title: Talk Like TED: The 9 Public-Speaking Secrets of the World's Top Minds
subtitle: The 9 Public-Speaking Secrets of the World's Top Minds
author: Carmine Gallo
themes: Passion as the Foundation of Persuasion
Authenticity and Vulnerability in Public Speaking
excerpt: A practical guide to the public speaking techniques used by the most popular TED speakers. Carmine Gallo distills nine principles of compelling presentation — from storytelling and conversational delivery to novelty and authenticity — that anyone can learn and apply to captivate any audience.
